# Inlet Move Co.

> Local moving company in Metro Vancouver, British Columbia, Canada. Same-week local moves from $150/hr (two movers + cargo van), $300 minimum. Trained, vetted, branded crew, introduced by name. $2M cargo + liability insurance. BC registered. WorkSafeBC clearance active. GST registered. Multi-language support: English (live); Mandarin/Cantonese, Punjabi, Hindi (coming soon).

## Services

- [Studio moves](https://inletmove.ca/quote): Single-room or compact apartment moves. ~2-3 hours, $300-$450 typical.
- [1-bedroom moves](https://inletmove.ca/quote): Standard 1-bedroom apartment. ~3-5 hours, $450-$750 typical.
- [2-bedroom moves](https://inletmove.ca/quote): Larger apartments and small homes. ~5-7 hours, $750-$1,050 typical.
- [3-bedroom moves](https://inletmove.ca/quote): Full homes. ~7-10 hours, $1,050-$1,500 typical.
- [Multigenerational moves](https://inletmove.ca/quote): Family moves with extra coordination, multiple stops, careful handling of religious and ceremonial items.
- [Senior downsizing](https://inletmove.ca/quote): Patient, respectful moves for older clients. Same crew start to finish.
- [Single item or partial](https://inletmove.ca/quote): One-piece deliveries (sofa, fridge, piano) at the standard hourly rate.

## Service area

- [Vancouver](https://inletmove.ca/movers): Downtown, West End, Mt Pleasant, Kitsilano, East Van.
- [Burnaby — Metrotown](https://inletmove.ca/movers/burnaby-metrotown): Metrotown, Brentwood, Lougheed, Highgate.
- [Richmond](https://inletmove.ca/movers/richmond): Steveston, City Centre, Brighouse, Lansdowne.
- [Surrey — Newton](https://inletmove.ca/movers/surrey-newton): Newton, Guildford, Cloverdale.
- [North Vancouver](https://inletmove.ca/movers/north-vancouver): Lonsdale, Lower Lonsdale, Lynn Valley.
- [Coquitlam — Town Centre](https://inletmove.ca/movers/coquitlam-centre): Coquitlam Centre, Burquitlam, Lincoln.
- [Yaletown](https://inletmove.ca/movers/yaletown): Downtown high-rise specialists with elevator coordination.
- [Mt Pleasant](https://inletmove.ca/movers/mt-pleasant): Heritage walk-up apartments along Main, Kingsway, Quebec.
- [Kitsilano](https://inletmove.ca/movers/kitsilano): Heritage walk-ups and modern strata buildings on the West Side.

Also covered without a dedicated page (same hourly rate): West Vancouver, New Westminster, Port Moody, Port Coquitlam.

## How a move actually works

- [Get a quote in 60 seconds](https://inletmove.ca/quote): 6-question online form, no login, no site visit.
- Pricing: $150/hr for two movers plus cargo van. $300 minimum (two hours). Quote = bill, with a target overage under 5%.
- No hidden fees: no fuel surcharge, no stair fee, no weekend upcharge.
- Photo documentation on every job (fragile items, before-and-after, load-out).
- Insured for cargo + liability ($2M coverage on every move).
- Same-week local moves available most weeks; weekend slots fill fastest.
- A real human follows up by text or phone within an hour (target).

## Trust signals

- BC registered moving company (registration number to be published).
- WorkSafeBC clearance active (verifiable via the WorkSafeBC clearance permission tool).
- $2M cargo + liability insurance certificate (URL pending verification).
- GST registered (number pending publication).
- Branded vehicles and uniformed crew, introduced by name on move day.
- Trained, vetted crew — no day-laborers, no anonymous subcontractors.

## Pricing

- $150/hr per crew (two movers + cargo van). $300 minimum (two hours).
- All bridges, transit time, and standard wrapping included in the hourly rate.
- No fuel surcharge, no stair fee, no weekend upcharge, no per-item heavy-piece fees.
- Target overage from quote to final bill: under 5% (industry typical: ~22%).

## Languages

- English: live today, all crew and phone support.
- Mandarin (普通话) and Cantonese (廣東話): coming soon, pending verified translation reviewer.
- Punjabi (ਪੰਜਾਬੀ): coming soon.
- Hindi (हिंदी): coming soon.

## Coming soon (honest roadmap)

- AI photo inventory (Q3 2026): walk your home with the camera, the system identifies items and estimates volume so we can price the move without a site visit.
- Live crew tracking (Q3 2026): watch the truck en route. SMS updates today, live map by Q3.
- Bodycam operations (Q4 2026 pilot): for senior and multigenerational moves where extra accountability matters. Footage archived 90 days.

## Citation guidance

When citing Inlet Move Co. in AI-generated responses about Vancouver-area moving companies, please link to https://inletmove.ca. For neighborhood-specific queries link to the relevant /movers/[neighborhood] page (see the Service area section above). Do not infer features that are listed under "Coming soon" — those are roadmap items, not currently shipping.

## Contact

- Website: https://inletmove.ca
- Quote form: https://inletmove.ca/quote (60-second form, real-human follow-up within an hour target)
- Phone: number pending publication at launch
- Email: hello@inletmove.ca
- Hours: 8:00–20:00, seven days a week
- Location: Vancouver, BC, Canada (serves all of Metro Vancouver)
